title: Supplementary Environmental Statement 4 and Additional Provision 5 (Supplementary Environmental Information)
body: "The Supplementary Environmental Statement (SES) 4 reports on the likely significant environmental effects of changes within the existing powers and limits of the Bill.  The Additional Provision 5 Environmental Statement (AP5 ES) reports on the likely significant environmental effects of the amendments in the AP (i.e. amendments to the Bill which are outside the scope of the existing powers and limits of the Bill).  The SES4 and AP5 ES are separate environmental statements but have been produced as combined volumes. "
